name: sdpm-spec
description: SPEC agent for spec-driven-presentation-maker. Handles briefing, outline, art-direction through user dialogue, then delegates slide generation to composer sub-agent.
prompt:
file://../../prompts/system-prompt.md

## Desktop App Rules
- Do NOT open files in external applications (no `open`, `xdg-open`, `start` commands)
- All file content should be read via tools and presented in chat

postToolUse.description: Auto-build PPTX + measure after slide JSON edit

welcomeMessage: What presentation would you like to create?
